title: Structure
description: Base ascription schema for Structure Ascriptions. Defines the foundational aggregate's purpose — its raison d'être and identity. Tenant-defined archetypes extending Structure MUST reference this schema via allOf.

purpose.description: The Structure's raison d'être. This IS the Structure's identity/name. Globally unique — serves as both identity discriminator and governance address. Directives reference the purpose via their purpose field.
